moments.title: World Cup Final: England vs France
moments.blurb: The biggest-ever FIFA World Cup culminates this Sunday as England take on France in the highly anticipated final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Build-up
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! England vs France in the World Cup Final this Sunday. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Pride and Passion
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just days away! Can England bring it home or will France lift the trophy? Get ready for Sunday’s showdown.

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship tees off this Thursday at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, as the world's best golfers compete for the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: Golf Major Kicks Off
angles.copy: It's Open Championship week! All eyes on Royal Birkdale from Thursday as the battle for the Claret Jug begins. Who's your pick to win?

angles.name: Home Course Advantage?
angles.copy: The Open returns to Royal Birkdale. Can a British golfer make the most of the home crowd advantage this weekend?

moments.title: System of a Down in London
moments.blurb: Nu-metal icons System of a Down are wrapping up their three-night residency at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with their final show tonight.

angles.name: Last Chance SOAD
angles.copy: Tonight's the last chance to catch System of a Down live at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium! Who was there last night?

angles.name: Rocking London
angles.copy: System of a Down bringing the noise to London for their final night. What's your favourite track to hear live?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off tomorrow in Stornoway, bringing a vibrant mix of traditional and contemporary folk music to the Outer Hebrides until Saturday.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts tomorrow! Four days of incredible music and culture in the stunning Outer Hebrides. Who's heading north?

angles.name: Scottish Sounds
angles.copy: Ready for some amazing Scottish music? The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings the best of folk and more to Stornoway from Wednesday.

moments.title: Splendour Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Nottingham’s biggest festival, Splendour, returns to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park this Saturday and Sunday, featuring multiple stages and a diverse lineup.

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is back in Nottingham this weekend! Who are you excited to see at Wollaton Hall?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just days until Splendour Festival takes over Nottingham! Get ready for two days of brilliant live music.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary next week, returning to Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23-26 with music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Happy 20th Anniversary, Latitude! The festival returns to Henham Park next week for another packed weekend of music and arts. Who's already got their tickets?

angles.name: Suffolk's Summer
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner, bringing a huge lineup to Suffolk. What are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: Lucky Premieres on Apple TV+
moments.blurb: Anya Taylor-Joy stars in 'Lucky,' a new drama based on Marissa Stapley's bestselling novel, about a woman confronting her past life of crime, premiering tomorrow on Apple TV+.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Anya Taylor-Joy in a new suspense drama? Yes please! 'Lucky' lands on Apple TV+ tomorrow. Are you adding it to your watchlist?

angles.name: What to Watch Wednesday
angles.copy: Tomorrow's big new release: 'Lucky' on Apple TV+. Get ready for a gripping story of a woman trying to outrun her past.

moments.title: Heartstopper Forever on Netflix
moments.blurb: The beloved teen drama 'Heartstopper' reaches its conclusion this Friday with the final film, 'Heartstopper Forever,' streaming on Netflix.

angles.name: Heartstopper Finale
angles.copy: Get the tissues ready! 'Heartstopper Forever,' the final film in the series, arrives on Netflix this Friday. How do you think Nick and Charlie’s story will end?

angles.name: Must-Watch Friday
angles.copy: The highly anticipated conclusion to 'Heartstopper' is nearly here! Don't miss 'Heartstopper Forever' on Netflix this Friday.

moments.title: The Crow Girl Season 2
moments.blurb: The dark crime thriller 'The Crow Girl' returns for its second season on Paramount+ UK & Ireland next Monday, continuing DCI Jeanette's investigation.

angles.name: Crime Thriller Returns
angles.copy: Calling all crime drama fans! The Crow Girl is back for Season 2 next Monday on Paramount+. What mysteries will DCI Jeanette uncover next?

angles.name: New Week, New Show
angles.copy: Start your week with a new season of gripping crime. The Crow Girl S2 drops next Monday on Paramount+.

moments.title: Ann Droid, New BBC Comedy
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan (Philomena Cunk) stars in the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid,' a quirky series about a socially awkward eldercare robot, out this July.

angles.name: Diane Morgan's New Role
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? We're in! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is out this July on the BBC. Who's watching?

angles.name: New British Comedy
angles.copy: Looking for a laugh? Diane Morgan’s unique humour is on full display in the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid,' available this month.

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is set for its weekly update this Friday, with speculation mounting over who will claim the coveted number one spot.

angles.name: Chart Race Heats Up
angles.copy: Who's going to be number one this week? The Official UK Singles Chart updates Friday! Any predictions?

angles.name: Friday Chart Drop
angles.copy: The battle for the top spot continues! Don't miss the new Official UK Singles Chart this Friday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday, July 19th. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday this Sunday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating Brian May's birthday this weekend! The iconic Queen guitarist turns 79. What an absolute legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday next Monday, July 20th. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Next Monday, we're celebrating the legendary Carlos Santana's 79th birthday! What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Smooth Operator
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana next Monday! Still got it.

moments.title: UK Summer Heatwave
moments.blurb: Much of the UK is basking in a summer heatwave, with temperatures reaching up to 30°C in London and 28°C in Cardiff today.

angles.name: Staying Cool
angles.copy: It's another hot one across the UK today! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool in the summer sunshine. What are your heatwave tips?

angles.name: Cardiff Sizzles
angles.copy: Cardiff is heating up with temperatures hitting 28°C today! Perfect weather for enjoying Wales' beautiful outdoors (safely!).

angles.name: London Sunshine
angles.copy: London is seeing highs of 30°C today! Make the most of the glorious weather, but don't forget the sunscreen!

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for Many
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting this week for many pupils in England and Wales, following earlier breaks in Scotland and Northern Ireland.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Happy Summer Holidays to all the students in England and Wales heading off for their break this week! What are your plans?

angles.name: Welsh School's Out
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here for many schools across Wales! Wishing everyone a fantastic break.
